title: simpa 27L Large Square Milano Grande Planter Pot - WHITE Set of 2 Pots - 51cm (H) x 26.5cm (W) x 26.5cm (D)
features: Bring a touch of style to your surroundings with our attractive Milano Grande plastic planters.
These lightweight yet rugged planters have no drainage holes making them great for use in any room of your home.
A simplistic design plant pot with a subtle textured matt coloured finish. A stylish standout feature for your home, garden, terrace, patio or conservatory.
These planters are currently available in Black, Slate Grey & White colours with more to follow.
Sold individually or in great value sets of 2 or 4 pots. Approx Dimensions: 51cm (H) x 26.5cm (W) x 26.5cm (D)
